# mp-mcp — pointers for LLM coding agents

This file is read first by tools like Claude Code. It points at the canonical
sources of project context. Do not re-derive the conventions below from the
codebase — read these files.

## Required reading

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) — project memory: mission, current milestone, conventions

## Project tooling

- [.claude/README.md](.claude/README.md) — what's in `.claude/` and why
- [.claude/commands/new-tool.md](.claude/commands/new-tool.md) — scaffold a tool
- [.claude/commands/new-adr.md](.claude/commands/new-adr.md) — record a decision
- [.claude/agents/tool-description-reviewer.md](.claude/agents/tool-description-reviewer.md) — critique tool descriptions

## Citation contract

Every tool response includes a `sources` array of parliament.uk URLs. Every
user-facing factual claim must cite them inline. This is enforced in the tool
descriptions and the server's `instructions` field.
